events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes pipe bedding & backfill work that follows the referenced detail, with clearances, labels, supports, and terminations in place, and no open correction notes on the inspection card. This is a compliance check at rough-complete stage.

Since everything is in place and follows the referenced detail, with no open correction notes, this should be a pass. Risk is low. No component conditions flagged. Percent complete would be high since it's rough-complete - maybe 85-90%. Confidence high since everything checks out.
